parentQuestion: The hypogastric region is ___ to the umbilical region.

scaffolds.q: What does 'inferior' mean in anatomical terms?
scaffolds.explain: Inferior means below or lower in position. Superior means above or higher. Think: your feet are inferior to your head (unless you're doing a headstand, in which case... still true). Simple, elegant, precise.

scaffolds.q: The umbilical region is named for what anatomical landmark?
scaffolds.explain: The umbilical region is centered on the umbilicus — your belly button, the scar left from your umbilical cord. It's the dead-center region of the nine-region abdominal grid. Your first connection to the outside world, preserved as a landmark.
